title: HOUSING DEFENSE NETWORK
description: Rapid-response legal support for renters facing eviction, illegal lockouts, or discriminatory housing practices, keeping marginalized families safely housed.

title: JAIL RELEASE STABILIZATION
description: Immediate housing placement and emergency funds for individuals leaving incarceration, preventing the cycle of homelessness and re-arrest during the critical 72-hour window.

title: UNHOUSED RIGHTS ADVOCACY
description: Fighting municipal sweeps, hostile architecture, and the criminalization of poverty through strategic litigation, community organizing, and direct action.

title: SHELTER ACCESS & NON-DISCRIMINATION
description: Ensuring shelters comply with anti-discrimination laws, particularly protecting trans and gender non-conforming individuals who are frequently denied safe emergency housing.

title: CHRT: HOUSING VIOLATIONS
description: Documenting landlord abuse, unlawful evictions, and uninhabitable living conditions to build systemic cases against predatory property owners and corporate landlords.
